title: Lead Instructional Designer at Sri Chaitanya

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Sri Chaitanya
jsonLd.description:
Join the Sri Chaitanya family as a Instructional Designer in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Sri Chaitanya:
Sri Chaitanya is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
